full_name: Titanium Alloy, Sheet, Strip, and Plate, 6Al - 4V, Annealed
version_year: see SAE catalog for current revision
scope: Ti-6Al-4V (Grade 5) titanium alloy in sheet, strip, and plate form, annealed condition, for aerospace parts.

chemical_composition.note: Nominal / limiting composition of Ti-6Al-4V as widely published by independent sources; values in wt%.

mechanical_properties.note: Typical room-temperature properties of annealed Ti-6Al-4V from independent datasheets.

license_note: Alloy composition/property data for Ti-6Al-4V is widely published by independent free sources (AZoM, MatWeb, ASM). Not reproduced from the copyrighted AMS document; AMS 4911 designation used only as an identifier.
